testuser2.section1_question:
How would your daily routine change if you viewed Bible study as a "treat" instead of a task?

    In your opinion, ano yung pinaka "sweet" na promise ni God na narinig mo na?
testuser2.section2_question:
Why do you think writing down a verse makes it stick better in our heads than just reading it?

Para sa'yo, what is the biggest distraction that stops you from having a "deep dive" study time?
testuser2.section3_question:
Have you ever shared a Bible verse with a friend that actually helped them through a tough day?

Bakit minsan nakaka-hiya or "awkward" mag-share about God sa workplace or school?
